summary: Frontend-only testing of the Industries page enhancement (9 industries with Get Quote + Explore Products buttons) and the new reusable /industries/:slug IndustryDetail page (8 sections). All structural and data-driven requirements PASS. Found minor content issues only: Perfume overview is 52 words (target 60-80) and the Perfume hero image is a generic reused Unsplash photo (same ID used by Electronics) that does not visually represent perfume/fragrance.

issues: Perfume overview paragraph is 52 words — outside required 60-80 word range. Add ~10-25 more words to the `overview` for the 'perfume' entry in INDUSTRIES_DETAIL.

Perfume hero image (photo-1607082348824-0a96f2a4b9da) is reused from Electronics and visually does not depict perfume / fragrance bottles. Replace with a premium perfume bottle / fragrance flacon Unsplash image.
Gallery image IDs are reused heavily across multiple industries (cosmetics/perfume/jewelry share several IDs) — consider unique perfume-specific premium imagery for distinctiveness.

action_items: Expand the perfume `overview` text in /app/frontend/src/lib/data.js so it falls within 60-80 words (currently 52).
Replace Perfume `img` (currently photo-1607082348824-0a96f2a4b9da, also used by Electronics) with a perfume/fragrance specific premium Unsplash image.
(Optional) Curate unique perfume-specific gallery image IDs instead of reusing the same six across cosmetics/perfume/jewelry.
critical_code_review_comments: IndustryDetail.jsx renders 8 sections cleanly with proper data-testids and is fully data-driven from INDUSTRIES_DETAIL — good DRY pattern.
404 fallback for unknown slug exists ('Industry not found') with back link — good defensive UX.
Solution cards correctly resolve PRODUCT_CATEGORIES via slug join (no broken links observed). `View Details` -> /products/{slug} works.

data-testids present on all critical interactive elements: industry-detail-{slug}, industry-hero-quote-{slug}, industry-solution-{slug}, industry-faq-{slug}, industry-cta-{slug}, industry-explore-{slug}, industry-quote-{i}.
Theme toggle works site-wide including on the new detail page (toggled to light & back successfully).

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (functional 100%; minor content issues on perfume overview length + hero image relevance)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified flows: 9 industries on /industries with side-by-side Get Quote + Explore Products buttons; all 9 detail pages (cosmetics, perfume, jewelry, food-sweets, chocolate, electronics, ecommerce, fashion-apparel, corporate-gifting) load and render the 8 sections. Data-driven solutions vary correctly per industry (Cosmetics: rigid-boxes/fmcg-monocartons/labels/luxury-gift-boxes vs Ecommerce: ecommerce-packaging/corrugated-boxes/paper-bags/labels). FAQ accordion expand works. Hero Get Quote and bottom CTA both route to /get-quote. 'View Details' on Rigid Boxes correctly navigates to /products/rigid-boxes. 'All industries' link returns to /industries. The only outstanding items for main agent are content tweaks (perfume overview word count and a more perfume-specific hero image).
